tests.notes: vitest not installed in node_modules in this environment — test runner unavailable locally. No diet-specific tests exist in the repo for this component. The implementation is pure additive JSX (31 lines) with no logic beyond inline filter counts; no business-logic unit tests were required by the acceptance doc.

grounding_checkpoint_required: Colin navigates to /diet -> Inventory tab. Verifies the summary bar shows three tiles (On hand, Low, Out) with correct counts. Cross-check against: SELECT status, COUNT(*) FROM grocery_inventory WHERE status != 'Expired' GROUP BY status ORDER BY status;
